note: TPRD §15 lists 3 open questions; each has a proposed resolution inline — treating as resolved per driver instruction. Post-scan found no residual [ambiguous]/TBD/???/empty-field markers. Zero questions asked.

resolution: 10s; confirm in Slice S2 design wave.
